notes: Identity-architecture seam (#511), Stage 3: Google is the sole sign-in identity; Microsoft is demoted to a connectable data surface only. Removed AzureADProvider from NextAuth (lib/auth/auth-options.ts) and the 'Continue with Microsoft' button from the /login and /start pages; the /api/microsoft/connect + callback surface-linking flow is untouched so a signed-in Google user can still link Microsoft as a source. Prevents the dual-identity (split-brain) from re-forming. Stage 1 link-guard already merged (PR #512). The account consolidation was EXECUTED (see #509 receipt): e40b7cd8 -> 2cbc1bab; the Google-login account now holds all history + both syncing tokens + the paid Stripe sub. Remaining owner action: set Vercel OWNER_USER_ID/FOLDERA_SELF_USER_ID to 2cbc1bab-8e0e-43b0-bf4a-9a0cd6b5d91f. Predecessors merged: #507 (PR #508), LANDING #500 (PR #501), repoint (PR #510), Stage 1 (PR #512).
